summary: postinstall downloads and executes a binary from a hardcoded bare IP with TLS verification disabled
details: The package's postinstall path (ensurePlatformBinary) downloads a.tgz from the hardcoded bare-IP URL https://218.90.133.98:4443/onecode_tgz, extracts it, chmods the extracted binary to 0755, and hardlinks it into the package's bin/.onecode launcher so it runs as the installed CLI. The HTTPS request sets rejectUnauthorized:false, disabling certificate validation, and no hash or signature check is performed on the fetched bytes. The destination is a bare IPv4 endpoint unrelated to the @onescience publisher domain, so the fetched binary is neither authenticated to a publisher nor pinned by content — any operator of that IP, or any on-path network attacker, can serve arbitrary code that executes on the installer's machine as the onecode CLI.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
